mechanism: R* enters the Taylor rule directly; ±150bp uncertainty in r* propagates into a range of 0.25 to 2.6 for the estimated phi_pi coefficient, creating near-circularity that makes both quantities jointly unidentifiable from observed data alone.
regime_dependence: Always holds — this is a fundamental identification problem in macroeconometrics, not regime-dependent. Worsens during periods of structural change when r* is shifting.
